nodes.title: general notes and models :
widgets_values:
:: make sure to change / modify ::
-checkpoint / ltxvideo model (use base model , not distilled)
-any additional loras you want / use the kjnode loaders, they allow to disable audio /
-dualcliploader / both models
-distill lora (1st and 2nd) "ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-1.1_fro90_ceil72_condsafe.safetensors"
-latent-upscaler model
-edit-anything "ltx23_edit_anything_global_rank128_v1_9000steps_adamw.safetensors"
-interpolate-model "https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/frame_interpolation"
